requirement_topic.en: NEHC Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz and Project Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: NEHC并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及项目协调
requirement_topic.zht: NEHC併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz及項目協調

summary.en: Kyrgyzstan's electricity sector is overseen by the Ministry of Energy and the National Energy Holding Company (NEHC) structure, with grid and distribution subsidiaries involved in project-level connection. Low-voltage supply is commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, matching China's nominal voltage and frequency baseline. For EV charging sites, the practical gate is not only product rating but also project coordination with the relevant grid operator for capacity, metering, protection, earthing, load management, commissioning, and any site-specific technical conditions. Rural, mountainous, and winter-stressed networks may require closer review of voltage quality, harmonics, cold start, and operating limits.
summary.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦电力部门由能源部和国家能源控股公司（NEHC）体系监管和管理，并网项目通常涉及相关输配电子公司。低压供电通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，与中国标称电压和频率基线一致。对电动汽车充电站点而言，实务门槛不仅是产品额定值，还包括与相关电网运营商就容量、计量、保护、接地、负载管理、调试和任何场址专属技术条件进行项目协调。农村、山区和冬季压力较大的电网可能需要更仔细审查电压质量、谐波、低温启动和运行限值。
summary.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦電力部門由能源部和國家能源控股公司（NEHC）體系監管和管理，併網項目通常涉及相關輸配電子公司。低壓供電通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，與中國標稱電壓和頻率基線一致。對電動汽車充電站點而言，實務門檻不僅是產品額定值，還包括與相關電網運營商就容量、計量、保護、接地、負載管理、調試和任何場址專屬技術條件進行項目協調。農村、山區和冬季壓力較大的電網可能需要更仔細審查電壓質量、諧波、低溫啟動和運行限值。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Energy of the Kyrgyz Republic — electricity-sector authority
National Energy Holding Company (NEHC) and grid / distribution subsidiaries — project-specific connection coordination
Kyrgyzstan low-voltage grid expectation: 220/380 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility, harmonics, flicker, surge, and power-quality evidence where requested

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are normally documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China's 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply matches Kyrgyzstan's nominal low-voltage grid, so basic voltage conversion risk is lower than in 240/415 V or 60 Hz markets. However, Chinese grid-operator acceptance, firmware settings, harmonic data, and site documents are not NEHC or Kyrgyzstan grid-operator approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电与吉尔吉斯斯坦标称低压电网一致，因此基础电压转换风险低于240/415 V或60 Hz市场。然而，中国电网运营商验收、固件设置、谐波数据和站点文件不是NEHC或吉尔吉斯斯坦电网运营商批准。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電與吉爾吉斯斯坦標稱低壓電網一致，因此基礎電壓轉換風險低於240/415 V或60 Hz市場。然而，中國電網運營商驗收、韌體設定、諧波數據和站點文件不是NEHC或吉爾吉斯斯坦電網運營商批准。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare a Kyrgyzstan-specific grid package: rated input confirmation for 220/380 V 50 Hz, harmonic and EMC data, earthing and residual-current protection design, load-management assumptions, metering interface, single-line diagram, commissioning plan, and cold / altitude operating evidence. The nominal grid match with China reduces voltage redesign risk, but it does not remove NEHC or local grid-operator review.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备吉尔吉斯斯坦专用并网资料包：220/380 V、50 Hz额定输入确认、谐波和EMC数据、接地及剩余电流保护设计、负载管理假设、计量接口、单线图、调试计划，以及低温/海拔运行证据。与中国标称电网一致可降低电压重新设计风险，但不能免除NEHC或当地电网运营商审查。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備吉爾吉斯斯坦專用併網資料包：220/380 V、50 Hz額定輸入確認、諧波和EMC數據、接地及剩餘電流保護設計、負載管理假設、計量接口、單線圖、調試計劃，以及低溫/海拔運行證據。與中國標稱電網一致可降低電壓重新設計風險，但不能免除NEHC或當地電網運營商審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected charger projects where NEHC, a grid / distribution subsidiary, site owner, public procurement, or project specification requires technical conditions or connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Kyrgyzstan grid-operator approval substitute

source.publisher: Ministry of Energy of the Kyrgyz Republic

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 220/380 V 50 Hz match with China is helpful, but a Kyrgyzstan-ready charger still needs NEHC or relevant grid-operator project coordination, power-quality evidence, site drawings, commissioning records, and cold / altitude operating confirmation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与中国同为220/380 V、50 Hz有利于适配，但面向吉尔吉斯斯坦的充电桩仍须完成NEHC或相关电网运营商项目协调、电能质量证据、站点图纸、调试记录，以及低温/海拔运行确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與中國同為220/380 V、50 Hz有利於適配，但面向吉爾吉斯斯坦的充電樁仍須完成NEHC或相關電網運營商項目協調、電能質量證據、站點圖紙、調試記錄，以及低溫/海拔運行確認。
